name: Irfan
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software engineer with experience in mobile development, AI integration, and full-stack TypeScript applications. Building AI-powered tools and developer tooling.

highlights: Designed CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions for automated iOS and Android builds, distributing test builds via Firebase App Distribution
Led cross-platform mobile development using React Native, translating Figma designs into production-ready components
Implemented automated code quality checks with linting, type checking, and pre-commit hooks
Containerized backend services using Docker with multi-architecture builds deployed to GitHub Container Registry
Integrated Sentry for application observability including error tracking and structured logging
Developed GraphQL API with PostgreSQL, including database migrations and automated test suites

projects.name: Jarvis
highlights: Built Telegram bot integrating Claude AI for automated GitHub repo analysis, market research, and job preparation workflow
Containerized with Docker Compose including Prometheus metrics collection and Grafana dashboards for monitoring
CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions for linting, Docker builds, and deployment to GitHub Container Registry

projects.name: Visimind
highlights: Text-to-diagram tool using Google Gemini for instant flowchart, mindmap, and org chart generation
Multi-tool architecture with SEO-optimized landing pages per diagram type

projects.name: Expo Starter CLI
highlights: Developer tooling CLI that scaffolds React Native projects with pre-configured CI/CD pipelines and code quality automation
Feature overlay system for composable project templates (auth, GraphQL, push notifications)
